notes: MASTER rack elevation (mirrored twin-rail) merged on top of the v1.6.51 refactor+reaper base. The MASTER cabinet query has a [LIST | ELEVATION] toggle; ELEVATION renders a realistic rack drawn with mirrored absolute layers so the two rails are guaranteed identical: rail hole columns at both edges (lit cyan holes on occupied U, dimmed for a seated-equipment look), a chassis block lapping over the inner edge of both rails with the hostname/model on it, and bright-white U numbers on top of every row, inboard of each rail. The assembly is centered and width-locked so nothing clips and it cannot pan side to side (overflow-x hidden, touch-action pan-y); only vertical scroll. Rack height from data (42U for AUS-01). Built on the shared Cage Nut Compass cn-* visual but fully scoped - the compass page is unchanged. Adapter master_rackToElevation maps each host's locCabRu RU (bottom U) to a slot; node height 8U for the Supermicro HGX H100/H200 nodes (master_nodeHeightU; site profile owns this later). Hosts with no U on record listed below the rack. BUILD's block-canvas elevation untouched. Source-of-truth note: this ships your v1.6.51 rack-elevation feature on top of the deployed v1.6.51 hotfix base (named-constant refactor + legacy-key reaper preserved). Cache stamp bumped v1.6.51 -> v1.6.52 so field iPads pick up the new bundle. Builds on v1.6.51.
